descriptionInUI: MOOSE CSAR runtime for the Combat SAR flight task. When a HUMAN pilot ejects, a downed-pilot is spawned with a radio beacon and the CH-47 flights tasked Combat SAR can fly in, hover/land, and recover them; C-130 flights tasked Combat SAR fly the HC-130 'King' overhead orbit. Inert unless at least one blue Combat SAR flight is in the mission (the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.CombatSAR only then). v1 is blue-side, human-pilot, player-flown; AI standing alert comes later.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Auto-smoke the downed pilot when a rescue helo is near
Pickup distance for boarding the downed pilot (m)
Rescue-hover height the helo must hold to pick up (m)
